reviews.review_msg: Blair is a good professor. My biggest problem with him is that he talks way too fast, and he chooses rather boring films. I fell asleep in all the lectures because the films never really held my attention, with the exception of "Ali: Fear Eats the Soul," I liked that a lot. Also, the textbook he uses is very very boring and irrelevant.

Not only the coolest dude in the school, but one helluva nice guy, looks like Edward Norton in Fight Club. If you can handle writing essays that say alot about nothing, then this course is gravy. Watch the movies, have opinions...that's it!
